violations.text: Various food items were observed held at (47-54) degrees Fahrenheit in flip top prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. -Food was voluntarily disposed of by PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Working containers of dry ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Observed the side door to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

Observed spoon handles in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Utensils moved to proper location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Observed flip top prep unit located in the cookline area was not in good repair. Ambient temperature observed maintaining 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Flip top prep unit shall not be used for TCS foods until repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

Observed the following non-food contact surfaces: 1) Fan covers in walk-in cooler observed with dust. 2) Shelving in walk-in cooler observed with dust. 3) Gaskets in refrigeration observed with food residue. 4) Inside refrigeration observed with food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
Observed handwashing sink in prep line area leaking and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The floors in the back storage area has an accumulation of debris under dry racks. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Establishment to manually mix sanitizer until the dispenser can be fixed/replaced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Thermometers are lacking in all the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Per PIC, clean (wet) rags used in the facility were observed stored in a container/hanging above the food prep sink and ketchup dispenser. Wiping cloths shall be air-dried in a location and in a manner that prevents contamination of FOOD, EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, LINENS, and SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES and the wiping cloths. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Soiled linens were observed being stored in the food prep sink. Soiled LINENS shall be kept in clean, nonabsorbent receptacles or clean, washable laundry bags and stored and transported to prevent contamination of FOOD, clean EQUIPMENT, clean UTENSILS, and SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The knife located in the chill area was not in good repair (chipped and melted handle). PIC removed knife from prep areas to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed to have an accumulation of dust, food residue, and/or other debris: 1) The fan covers of the walk-in cooler observed with dust 2) The inside of the refrigeration units observed with an accumulation of food debris 3) The guard of the ice machine observed with biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The spray hose at the 3-bay sink in the grill side was observed to be leaking. A plumbing system shall be maintained in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

The floors in the back storage area and walk-in cooler has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris, and other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the outside dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the food prep area and in the back storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2024
